abilities.description: Sends a swarm of winged beasts to savage enemy units in front of Death Prophet.
params: Passive Component[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Spirits Spawn per Unit Hit: 1
abilities.name: Crypt Swarm
abilities.story: Krobelus' many trips to the grave gather a flock of the damned.

abilities.description: Fires a projectile that prevents enemy units in a target area from casting spells.
params: Passive Component[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Spirits Spawn per Unit Hit: 1
abilities.name: Silence
abilities.story: Peering into the veil of her opponent's demise, Krobelus sees a silent future.

abilities.description: Creates a spirit link between Death Prophet and an enemy unit, draining health from the enemy.
params: Passive Component[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Spirits Spawn per Cast: 1
abilities.name: Spirit Siphon
abilities.story: Krobelus willingly shows others the path she alone cannot follow.

abilities.description: Unleashes evil spirits to drain the life of nearby enemy units and structures. At the end of the spell's duration, Death Prophet is healed in proportion to the damage dealt. Lasts 40 seconds. Passively grants movement speed.
params: Passive ComponentSpirits Min Damage: 62Spirits Max Damage: 67Building Damage Multiplier: 0.5Damage as Heal: 25%Self Move Speed Bonus: 12/16/20%[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Passive Spirit Damage Multiplier: 1.5[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Passive Spirit Spawn per Attack: 1[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Passive Spirit Move Speed Slow: 100%[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Passive Spirit Slow Duration: 0.3[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Passive Spirit Max Duration: 20
abilities.name: Exorcism
abilities.story: Over time, the banshee remnants of her previous lives return to haunt the present.

description: Summons an army of ghosts to attack. Denied her own death time and again, Krobelus returns from the grave with skills acquired from the beyond. Gathering a Crypt Swarm, she sends forth a flock of winged beast to harass the living. A pall of Silence falls over the land, stifling any objection as she Siphons multiple enemies dry simultaneously. Mortals beware. As she performs an Exorcism, unleashing the banshee remnants of her previous lives, demolishing enemies and their defenses alive, turning the battlefield into her own haunted ground.  Carry Pusher Nuker Disabler  Arachnophobic, Female, Flying, Undead, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: At some point, she, along with Io and Silencer, had her costume and ability color palettes changed. Before, Death Prophet's garments and ability icons were more purple in color.
